title: oxypolis caroliniana
intro: Oxypolis caroliniana, also known as Carolina false parsley or wild carrot, is a perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating digestive issues and menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Oxypolis caroliniana include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving menstrual symptoms. Herbal preparations of Oxypolis caroliniana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's roots, leaves, and stems.
